name: Meatball Meal in One
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the bread crumbs, milk, salt, garlic salt, and dried basil.
2. Add the ground beef to the mixture. Mix well until combined.
3. Shape the mixture into 4 meatballs and set aside.
4. In a casserole dish, combine the potato and carrot slices with salt and pepper.
5. Melt butter in a saucepan. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper.
6. Gradually add milk to the saucepan, stirring until thickened and bubbly.
7. Pour the sauce over the vegetable mixture.
8. Top with the meatballs.
9. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
10. Uncover and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
11. Sprinkle paprika on top before serving.
